_publications._publicationTitle: Elucidating Microstructural Alterations in Neurodevelopmental Disorders: Application of Advanced Diffusion-Weighted Imaging in Children With Rasopathies.

_contextSnippet: ODI demonstrated the least sensitivity to changes of the three measures investigated, and the results did not show a clear pattern across the groups.
details: ODI demonstrated the least sensitivity to changes of the three measures investigated, and results did not show a clear pattern across groups. Found evidence of decreased ODI in NF1 compared with NS in caudate (estimate 0.021, p = 0.044, d = 0.77) and thalamus (estimate 0.018, p < 0.0001, d = 1.39)
